era: 1994-present. Space/Stoner Rock. E=7 -- heavy riff-locked, psychedelic-cosmic. Second engine appearance. Hollywood Records.

theory_nodes.concept: SECOND ENGINE APPEARANCE. Wellwater Conspiracy documents two modes: accessible (first entry) and heavy/Space/Stoner Rock (degree 257). The engine revisits when new terrain exists. Two entries = two distinct artistic registers.
theory_nodes.description: Engine revisit methodology: Wellwater Conspiracy occupies two degree coordinates.

theory_nodes.concept: McBain-Cameron combination: Monster Magnet stoner rock riff vocabulary + Matt Cameron precision drumming. Most stoner rock has loose rhythm sections; Wellwater Conspiracy has Cameron, making the heavy riff float on an airtight groove. The combination is specific and not reproducible.
theory_nodes.description: Monster Magnet genealogy meets Seattle drumming precision.

theory_nodes.concept: Storm Arc context: degrees 256-260. Four consecutive E=8 in SPS (256-259) then E=9 at degree 260 (ABSOLUTE SPS MAXIMUM). Wellwater Conspiracy at E=7 paired with Juan de Fuca Surf (E=8). Human-scale heavy music against geological-scale coastal sound. Stoner rock riffs repeat like waves; sustained guitar tones resemble sustained surf.
theory_nodes.description: Storm Arc pairing: stoner rock and open coast acoustics aligned.

cross_references.relationship: First appearance established personnel and Seattle context. Second appearance (257) documents heavy Space/Stoner Rock mode. Same band, different energy register.
Energy shifts from E=7 stoner rock to E=5 classic rock. Storm Arc S36 side transitions.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=7 vs E=8. Heavy stoner rock riffs vs. sustained open coast roar. Both large, sustained, low-frequency presences. Acoustic parallel between repeating guitar riff and repeating ocean wave.

discography.title: Declaration of Conformity
discography.label: Hollywood Records
discography.notes: Major label debut. Wider distribution. Rock press visibility.

discography.title: The Scroll and Its Combinations
discography.label: Hollywood Records
discography.notes: More focused and confident. Band finds its specific form.

storm_arc_position.note: Storm Arc escalates to E=9 at degree 260 (NEW ABSOLUTE SPS MAXIMUM)
